hero.subtitle: Where every dish tells a story and every bite is a memory. Indulge in a culinary journey crafted with passion, precision, and the finest seasonal ingredients.

about.p1: Founded in 2009 by acclaimed chef Marco Aurelio, Aurum Bistro was born from a dream to bring the soul of Mediterranean cuisine to the heart of the city. Nestled in a warmly lit space designed for connection and celebration, we believe food is the universal language of love.
about.p2: Every dish on our menu is a reflection of our commitment to quality — locally sourced produce, time-honored recipes, and modern culinary artistry united in perfect harmony. We don't just serve meals; we craft experiences that linger long after the last bite.

menu.subtitle: Each dish is a masterpiece, thoughtfully composed with ingredients sourced at their peak.

burrata.name: Burrata & Heirloom Tomatoes
burrata.description: Creamy burrata on a bed of vibrant heirloom tomatoes, drizzled with aged balsamic and fresh basil oil.

scallops.name: Seared Scallops
scallops.description: Pan-seared diver scallops with cauliflower purée, crispy capers, and lemon butter sauce.

wagyu.name: Wagyu Beef Tenderloin
wagyu.description: Grade A5 Wagyu, sous vide to perfection, served with truffle mash and roasted asparagus.

seabass.name: Pan-Roasted Sea Bass
seabass.description: Atlantic sea bass with saffron risotto, charred lemon, and herb-infused olive oil.

risotto.name: Wild Mushroom Risotto
risotto.description: Arborio rice slow-cooked with porcini, chanterelle, and truffle oil, finished with aged Parmigiano.

chocolateSphere.name: Valrhona Chocolate Sphere
chocolateSphere.description: Dark chocolate sphere melted with warm caramel, raspberry coulis, and vanilla ice cream.

cremeBrulee.name: Crème Brûlée Classique
cremeBrulee.description: Silky vanilla custard with a perfectly torched caramelized crust, served with fresh berries.

sangria.name: Passion Fruit Sangria
sangria.description: House-crafted sangria with passion fruit, mango nectar, cava, and fresh citrus.

whyUs.subtitle: More than a restaurant — a destination where exceptional food meets an unforgettable ambiance.

ingredients.title: Farm-Fresh Ingredients
ingredients.description: We partner with local organic farms to source the freshest seasonal produce, ensuring every plate bursts with natural flavor.

chefs.title: Award-Winning Chefs
chefs.description: Our culinary team brings decades of experience from Michelin-starred kitchens across Europe and the Mediterranean.

recipes.title: Signature Recipes
recipes.description: Every dish is an original creation, perfected over years of refinement and rooted in authentic culinary traditions.

atmosphere.title: Intimate Atmosphere
atmosphere.description: Whether it's a romantic dinner or a celebratory gathering, our thoughtfully designed spaces set the perfect mood.

service.title: Attentive Service
service.description: Our staff anticipates your every need with warmth and discretion — because exceptional service is part of the recipe.

experiences.title: Memorable Experiences
experiences.description: From the first impression to the final bite, we craft every detail to ensure your evening becomes a cherished memory.

gallery.subtitle: Explore the artistry behind our cuisine and the warmth of our spaces.

testimonials.subtitle: Don't take our word for it — hear from the people who've lived the Aurum experience.

reviews.sophie: Aurum Bistro is a rare gem. The Wagyu Tenderloin was flawlessly executed, and the atmosphere struck a perfect balance between intimate and vibrant. Easily one of the finest dining experiences I've had this year.
reviews.james: Every single detail was thought through — from the handwritten menu to the sommelier's perfect wine pairing. The Chocolate Sphere dessert left me speechless. I'll be back every visit to this city.
reviews.amelia: We celebrated our anniversary here and it was beyond magical. The staff remembered our name, the table was adorned with flowers, and the tasting menu was extraordinary. Pure luxury at every turn.

cta.subtitle: Whether it's a special occasion or simply a desire for the extraordinary — we're ready to make your night unforgettable. Reserve your table today.

contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Make a reservation or drop us a message.

form.title: Make a Reservation
form.name: Full Name
form.successMessage: Thank you! We'll confirm your table within 2 hours.

footer.tagline: A fine dining experience where passion meets perfection. Every meal is a story worth remembering.
footer.newsletterText: Subscribe for seasonal menus, exclusive events, and curated dining inspiration.
